missionCards.heading: A restoration of time, elimination of repetitive.
missionCards.description: We sell time—the origin of value. Schools lose 40 hours monthly to paperwork; we give 80% of that back. Our open-source platform transforms fragmented systems into unified infrastructure, cutting operational costs by 60%.
missionCards.values: Transparency breeds accountability—when every stakeholder has access to real-time data, trust grows and outcomes improve. Open-source is participatory development: communities inspect, modify, and own their tools. They're not consumers—they're co-creators building capacity, reducing dependency, and ensuring sustainability.

storySection.quote: When schools automate the mundane, what do educators focus on?

openSource.title: Proudly Open Source
openSource.description: Hogwarts is open source and powered by open source software. The code is available on

time.subtitle: We sell the origin of value.

items.name: Osman Abdout

letsWorkTogether.title: Let's Work Together
letsWorkTogether.description: Ready to revolutionize your educational institution with advanced automation? Experience streamlined operations and enhanced learning outcomes for students and educators.
letsWorkTogether.messagePlaceholder: What educational processes would you like to automate?

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our platform and services.
faqs.openSourceTitle: Is the educational platform really open source?
faqs.openSourceDesc: Yes! Every component and building block is open source. We charge for crafting fully functional educational solutions and ensuring their ongoing reliability.
openSourceItems: All educational components and templates are freely available
Contributors earn a share of the value they help create
Full transparency in development and educational processes

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: We offer a free tier for small schools with essential features. Paid plans scale based on the number of students and modules you need. All pricing is transparent with no hidden fees or long-term contracts.
list: Free tier for schools under 100 students
Pay-per-student pricing for larger schools
No setup fees or long-term contracts
Volume discounts for school networks

items.question: Is my school's data secure?
items.answer: Security is our top priority. We implement industry-standard practices to protect student and staff data at every level.
list: End-to-end encryption for all data in transit and at rest
Role-based access control with 8 distinct permission levels
Automatic daily backups with point-in-time recovery
Full audit logging of all administrative actions

items.question: How do we migrate from our current system?
items.answer: We provide a guided migration process with dedicated support to ensure a smooth transition with zero data loss.
list: Bulk import from Excel, CSV, or existing SIS platforms
Dedicated migration specialist assigned to your school
Parallel running period to verify data accuracy
Typical migration completes in 1-2 weeks

items.question: Does it integrate with tools we already use?
items.answer: Yes. We integrate with the most popular tools schools already rely on, and our open API allows custom integrations.
list: Google Workspace and Microsoft 365 for single sign-on
Popular LMS platforms like Google Classroom and Moodle
Payment gateways for tuition and fee collection
Open API for custom integrations with any system

items.question: Can it be customized for our curriculum?
items.answer: Absolutely. The platform supports multiple curricula and can be tailored to your country's specific educational requirements.
list: Support for national, international, and custom curricula
Configurable grading scales and assessment types
Localized report cards and transcripts
Arabic and English interface with full RTL support

items.question: Can we manage multiple schools from one system?
items.answer: Yes. Our multi-tenant architecture is designed for school networks and districts, giving you centralized oversight with per-school customization.
list: Single dashboard to manage all your schools
Per-school configuration for branding, curriculum, and policies
Consolidated reporting across the entire network
Centralized user management with school-level permissions

items.question: What support and training do you provide?
items.answer: We offer multiple support channels to help your team get up and running quickly and stay productive.
list: Comprehensive documentation and video tutorials
Community support via Discord and GitHub Discussions
Onboarding workshops for administrators and teachers
Premium support packages with dedicated account managers

items.question: Still have questions?
list: Browse our documentation
Join our Discord community
Start a discussion on GitHub
Email us at hello@databayt.org

introduction.paragraph1: Automate the boring. at Databayt we're building codebase for business automation, one atomic component at a time. Every line of code is open source, every contribution is valued, and every developer may shape the future of how businesses operate.
introduction.paragraph2: We sell the origin of all value — we sell Time, the currency that drives the world — what if you could reclaim yours and focus on what truly matters? It's more than a service — it's an escape from the matrix. A restoration of time through the elimination of repetitive tasks, streamlined operations, and automated processes. Break free. Reclaim your hours.
introduction.paragraph3: The Repository of Wonders. Think of our codebase as a living library where every contribution becomes part of something greater. From atomic components to complete templates, from blocks to micro-services to full automation solutions—we're creating the building blocks that will power tomorrow's businesses.
introduction.paragraph4: Follow along as we figure this out together. This isn't just about building software; it's about creating a collaborative ecosystem where developers, businesses, and innovators unite to solve real problems. Every contribution you make doesn't just help one project—it becomes part of a growing foundation that serves countless businesses worldwide.

whatWeDo.title: What We Do
whatWeDo.automation: Automation - Streamlined workflows and process optimization
whatWeDo.consulting: Consulting - Technical expertise and implementation support
whatWeDo.openSource: Open Source - Community-driven development and innovation

perProject.title: Per Project
perProject.description: Custom solutions tailored to specific client requirements and business processes. Each project delivers unique automation systems designed to solve particular challenges and operational needs.

partners.title: Partners
partners.description: Partnership opportunities for businesses seeking to outsource technology development, access specialized talent for temporary projects and specific technical expertise.

codebase.title: Codebase
codebase.description: Codebase executes the majority of the task, through accumulated, reusable components. Contributors who expand this foundation earn a share of the value it generates.

saas.title: SaaS
saas.description: Ready-to-deploy software products sold to multiple organizations with similar needs. act as a go-to central hub for businesses seeking automation solutions.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Every decision, from technical architecture to business strategy, is documented and accessible to the community. We use GitHub to manage our codebase and discussions, ensuring transparency, traceability, and open collaboration. Contributions are publicly tracked, so every developer can see their impact and know the process is clear and fair. We believe this openness builds trust and enables better contributions.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Our best ideas come from our diverse community of developers, business professionals, and users. We actively encourage contributions and value every perspective. We're actively building in: Business Automation, Data Analytics, AI Agents, Blockchain, and Distributed Computing.

growth.title: Growth
growth.description: We balance rapid innovation with long-term sustainability, ensuring our solutions remain robust and our business model benefits all stakeholders.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: Every product we ship meets the highest standards of quality, security, and performance. Our reputation is built on reliable, enterprise-grade solutions.

pricing.title: Simple. Transparent.
pricing.subtitle: All components and building blocks are open source — we charge for crafting fully functional masterpieces and ensuring their ongoing reliability.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Your guide to pricing and plans with Databayt.

questions.question: What's included in the One Project plan?
questions.answer: The One Project plan includes complete custom development for a single automation solution, including consultation, development, testing, and deployment.

questions.question: How does the hourly billing work for Strategic Partner?
questions.answer: With Strategic Partner, you get access to our development team at $10/hour. Perfect for ongoing projects, maintenance, or when you need flexible development resources.

questions.question: Can I switch between plans?
questions.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes will be reflected in your next billing cycle.

questions.question: Do you offer enterprise solutions?
questions.answer: Absolutely! For enterprise needs, we offer custom solutions with dedicated teams, SLAs, and specialized support. Contact us for a tailored quote.

securePayment.title: Secure Payment
securePayment.description: Your security is our priority. We use industry-leading encryption and security protocols to ensure your payment information is always protected.

services.title: Service
services.description: We offer comprehensive web design and branding solutions to help your business stand out in the digital landscape. From stunning websites to memorable brand identities.

design.title: Design
design.description: Creating stunning visual designs with modern UI/UX, graphics, and layouts. We bring innovative concepts to life with creative excellence.

branding.title: Branding
branding.description: Create a memorable brand identity that resonates with your audience. From logos to complete brand guidelines, we craft visual stories that build trust and recognition.

creative.title: Creative
creative.description: We offer comprehensive creative services including content creation, poster design, and professional video editing. Our team specializes in bringing your vision to life.

sales.title: Sales
sales.description: Effective sales strategies to increase your revenue and grow your business.
sales.readyToTakeNext: Ready to take your business to the next level?

castle.title: The Castle of Hogwarts
castle.description: Founded over a thousand years ago by the four greatest witches and wizards of the age, Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry stands as a magnificent castle in the Scottish Highlands. Our ancient walls have witnessed countless magical moments and housed generations of extraordinary students.

greatHall.title: The Great Hall
greatHall.description: The heart of Hogwarts, where students gather for meals, celebrations, and the annual Sorting Ceremony. The enchanted ceiling reflects the sky above, and floating candles provide a magical ambiance. This is where house unity and school pride flourish.

gryffindor.title: Gryffindor House
gryffindor.description: Home to the brave and daring, Gryffindor House values courage, chivalry, and determination. Founded by Godric Gryffindor, this house has produced some of the most famous witches and wizards, including Harry Potter himself.

studies.title: Magical Studies
studies.description: From Herbology in the greenhouses to Defense Against the Dark Arts, Hogwarts offers a comprehensive magical education. Students learn to brew potions, cast spells, and understand the mysteries of the magical world under expert guidance.

friendship.title: The Bonds of Friendship
friendship.description: At Hogwarts, friendships are forged that last a lifetime. Through shared adventures, challenges, and magical discoveries, students form unbreakable bonds that support them through their darkest hours and greatest triumphs.

quidditch.title: Quidditch Pitch
quidditch.description: The magical sport of Quidditch brings excitement and house rivalry to new heights. Our pitch has witnessed legendary matches and continues to be where young witches and wizards discover their passion for flying and the thrill of chasing the Golden Snitch.

hero.title:
Beautiful Mind,
Curious. Wonder.
hero.subtitle: The most magical part of the Harry Potter books, is that they eventually used the skills they learned at school

hero.title:
Academic
Excellence
hero.subtitle: Discover your potential through rigorous academics and innovative learning. Our comprehensive programs are designed to unlock every student's capabilities.

cta.title: Ready to Begin Your Academic Journey?
cta.subtitle: Explore our rigorous academic programs designed to prepare students for success in higher education and beyond.

programs.title: Academic Programs
programs.subtitle: Comprehensive educational pathways designed to unlock every student's potential and prepare them for future success.

core.title: Core Academic Excellence
core.description: Rigorous curriculum in Mathematics, Sciences, Literature, and Humanities that builds strong foundational knowledge.

steam.title: STEAM Innovation
steam.description: Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts, and Mathematics programs that foster creativity and problem-solving skills.

global.title: Global Studies
global.description: International perspectives, language learning, and cultural exchange programs that prepare students for a connected world.

ap.title: Advanced Placement
ap.description: College-level courses that challenge high-achieving students and provide college credit opportunities.

arts.title: Arts & Creativity
arts.description: Comprehensive arts education including music, visual arts, drama, and creative writing to nurture artistic expression.

character.title: Character Education
character.description: Values-based learning that develops integrity, leadership, and social responsibility in every student.

stats.title: Academic Excellence
stats.subtitle: Numbers that reflect our commitment to academic excellence and the transformative impact of our educational programs.

curriculum.title: Curriculum Overview
curriculum.subtitle: Our progressive curriculum is designed to build knowledge systematically while fostering critical thinking and creativity at every stage.

earlyYears.title: Early Years (K-5)
earlyYears.description: Foundation building with hands-on learning, literacy development, and social skills through play-based education.

middleSchool.title: Middle School (6-8)
middleSchool.description: Transitional years focusing on critical thinking, independent learning, and preparation for advanced studies.

highSchool.title: High School (9-12)
highSchool.description: College preparatory curriculum with specialized tracks, AP courses, and career exploration opportunities.

contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your educational needs or questions...

questions.question: How do I get my Hogwarts letter?
questions.answer: Your Hogwarts letter will be delivered by owl post on your 11th birthday. If you haven't received it by then, please check with your local Ministry of Magic office.
listItems: Letters are automatically sent to all magical children on their birthday.
Muggle-born students may experience delays due to protective enchantments.
If your letter is lost, a Hogwarts representative will visit you personally.

questions.question: What house will I be sorted into?
questions.answer: The Sorting Hat will determine your house during the Welcome Feast. It considers your personality, values, and preferences to place you in Gryffindor, Hufflepuff, Ravenclaw, or Slytherin.

questions.question: What supplies do I need for school?
questions.answer: Your Hogwarts letter includes a complete list of required books and equipment. You can purchase everything at Diagon Alley.
listItems: Standard spell books, cauldron, and magical ingredients
A wand from Ollivanders (the wand chooses the wizard!)
Robes, pointed hat, and protective gloves
Optional: owl, cat, or toad as a pet

questions.question: How do I contact the school?
questions.answer: You can send an owl to Hogwarts School, or use the Floo Network to speak with our admissions office. Muggle post is also accepted but may take longer to reach us.

items.name: Gryffindor Academy
items.longDescription: Develop courage and leadership skills through history, government, and community service programs.

items.name: Ravenclaw Institute
items.longDescription: Pursue wisdom through cutting-edge STEM programs and innovative problem-solving challenges.

items.name: Hufflepuff College
items.longDescription: Cultivate creativity and empathy through comprehensive arts, literature, and humanities programs.

items.name: Slytherin School
items.longDescription: Foster determination and strategic reasoning through finance, business studies, and innovation programs.

features.title: Features
features.numbersDescription: Numbers that reflect our commitment to excellence and the magical transformations happening in our classrooms every day.

items.title: Immersive Learning
items.description: Interactive and immersive education that transforms traditional learning into an enchanting adventure.

items.title: Dynamic Programs
items.description: Carefully crafted programs that blend core academics with creative thinking and real-world applications.

items.title: House Community
items.description: Close-knit learning communities that foster friendship, collaboration, and mutual support among students.

items.title: Champions League
items.description: Academic competitions, sports tournaments, and creative challenges that celebrate every student's unique talents.

items.title: Worldwide Adventures
items.description: Global exchange programs and virtual international collaborations that expand horizons beyond our castle walls.

items.title: Innovation Potions
items.description: STEAM laboratories and maker spaces where students concoct creative solutions to real-world challenges.

core.title: Core
core.description: These values guide everything we do at our school.

items.title: Courage
items.description: Be brave, take risks, and stand up for what's right.

items.title: Wisdom
items.description: Reflect deeply and pursue understanding beyond facts.

items.title: Loyalty
items.description: Support each other and stay committed to shared goals.

items.title: Ambition
items.description: Excel, innovate, and make positive changes in the world.

faculty.title: Faculty
faculty.description: Meet the wizards who make learning magical

professors.name: Albus Dumbledore
professors.title: Headmaster & Chief Warlock
professors.subject: Transfiguration & Ancient Magic
professors.description: Leading our school with wisdom and extraordinary magical knowledge, Professor Dumbledore guides students through the most complex magical arts.
professors.quote: It is our choices that show what we truly are, far more than our abilities.

professors.name: Severus Snape
professors.title: Potions Master & Head of Slytherin
professors.subject: Potions & Dark Arts Defense
professors.description: With precision and dedication, Professor Snape guides students through the intricate art of potion-making and magical defense.
professors.quote: Attention to detail separates the exceptional from the merely adequate.

professors.name: Minerva McGonagall
professors.title: Deputy & Head of Gryffindor
professors.subject: Transfiguration
professors.description: Professor McGonagall transforms students' understanding of magic through her mastery of Transfiguration and unwavering dedication to excellence.
professors.quote: We teachers are rather good at magic, you know.

professors.name: Rubeus Hagrid
professors.title: Keeper of Keys & Grounds
professors.subject: Care of Magical Creatures
professors.description: Hagrid nurtures both magical creatures and students with his boundless enthusiasm and deep knowledge of the magical world.
professors.quote: What's comin' will come, and we'll meet it when it does.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.description: Hear from our students, alumni, and parents about the transformative power of education and the magical moments that happen within our school community every day.

items.quote: This school didn't just teach me subjects—it taught me to believe in magic, both in learning and in myself. The teachers here don't just educate; they inspire and transform.
items.name: Emily Harrison
items.title: Class of 2023, Gryffindor Academy

items.quote: The innovation labs here are incredible! I've been able to work on real research projects and even present at science fairs. It's like having access to a magical laboratory.
items.name: Michael Chen
items.title: Current Student, Ravenclaw Institute

items.quote: Watching my daughter flourish here has been magical. She's gained confidence, made lifelong friends, and discovered passions I never knew she had. The community feeling is extraordinary.
items.name: Sarah Martinez
items.title: Parent of Sofia Martinez

items.quote: The arts program here is phenomenal. I discovered my love for theater and creative writing, and the teachers supported every creative endeavor. It truly felt like Hogwarts for artists.
items.name: James Wilson
items.title: Class of 2022, Hufflepuff College

items.quote: As an educator myself, I was impressed by the innovative teaching methods and genuine care for each student's individual growth. The house system creates such meaningful connections.
items.name: Dr. Patricia Kumar
items.title: Parent of Arjun Kumar

items.quote: The business and entrepreneurship program opened my eyes to possibilities I never imagined. I've already started my own small venture with guidance from our amazing teachers!
items.name: Olivia Thompson
items.title: Current Student, Slytherin School
